# CodeVetter

> Desktop-first AI code review workbench for agent-generated code. Local SQLite storage, Tauri shell, evidence-backed review loops — your repo never hits a central server.

Open source (ISC). macOS desktop app with optional Claude, Codex, or Gemini CLI backends.

## Product

- [Home](https://codevetter.com/): Features, pricing, and how it works
- [Download](https://codevetter.com/download): macOS release and install instructions
- [Agent PR benchmark](https://codevetter.com/benchmark): Public benchmark plan for measuring AI review catch rate
- [Privacy](https://codevetter.com/privacy): Local-first data handling and third-party CLI usage
- [Terms](https://codevetter.com/terms): Terms of use

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/Codevetter/codevetter#readme): Architecture, desktop app setup, and product direction
- [Releases](https://github.com/Codevetter/codevetter/releases): Changelog and binaries

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
- [Sarthak Agrawal](https://sarthakagrawal.dev): Builder portfolio
